mapper.select: select ac.*, su.user_name as approver_name from approval_chain ac left join sys_user su on ac.approver_id = su.user_id where ac.dept_id = #{deptId} and ac.plan_type = #{planType} order by ac.approval_level, ac.sort_order

select ac.*, sd.dept_name, su.user_name as approver_name from approval_chain ac left join sys_dept sd on ac.dept_id = sd.dept_id left join sys_user su on ac.approver_id = su.user_id where ac.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into approval_chain (dept_id, plan_type, approval_level, approver_id, sort_order, create_by, create_time) values (#{deptId}, #{planType}, #{approvalLevel}, #{approverId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
